chapter_title.en: The Call to Prayer and the Establishment of Prayer and the Reward of the Muezzins

text: 895 - وَ سَأَلَ مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ وَهْبٍ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: عَنِ اَلتَّثْوِيبِ اَلَّذِي يَكُونُ بَيْنَ اَلْأَذَانِ وَ اَلْإِقَامَةِ فَقَالَ «مَا نَعْرِفُهُ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.895 - Muawiya ibn Wahb asked Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) about the practice of "tathwib" (additional announcements or calls made between the adhan and the iqamah).
Imam (as) replied: "We do not recognize it”.
